root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, count( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) as count_contract, sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ) as principal_balance
,( select count(membership_no) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '0000' and '9500') and (member_status_code <>'3')) as c_count_mem
,( select nvl(sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock),0) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0') and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no not in ('a8000', 'a8100'))) as c_share_stock_mem_code_0
,( select nvl(sum(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock),0) from sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered Where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = 'a8000')) as c_share_stock_mem_code_1
,case loan_group_code when '01' then 'เงินกู้ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then 'เงินกู้สามัญ' when '03' then 'เงินกู้พิเศษ' end as c_loan_group_code
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no not in ( '9650' , '9988' ) ) ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no not in ('fundmem') GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code

r_mwa_loan_balance_all_by_group_nest_fun.sql: select sum (total_balance) as fund_amount , count (loan_contract_no) as count_conno from sc_fund_mem where close_status = '0' and total_balance > 0

r_mwa_loan_balance_all_by_group_nest_spe.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, count( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) as count_contract, sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ) as principal_balance FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '3' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no <> '9650' ) ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = 'ฉอ' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code
